settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your account, marketplace, and preferences.

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.description: Choose your default Amazon marketplace. This affects all product research data.
marketplace.label: Default marketplace

auth.title: Authentication
auth.signOutConfirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?

extension.title: Browser Extension
extension.description: The Puckora Chrome extension enables Amazon scraping directly from your browser. Requires Chrome 114 or later.
extension.notInstalledHint: The extension is not installed yet. Install it to unlock Amazon scraping from your browser.
extension.featureScraping: Check Amazon search results in real time
extension.featureAnalysis: Scan product pages with one click
extension.unsyncedHint: Open the extension popup and sign in — or click Sync now to push your session automatically.
